def positive_python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_cartesian_product_materialized_before_filter():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_cartesian_product_materialized_before_filter"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag itertools product or nested loops materialized before cheap filters narrow the pairs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
